zh.Bucklow, Baguley, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾巴可洛福 希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph de Baguley於大約1230年出生在英國英格蘭爾巴古利時，他的父親Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley35歲，母親Alice de Vernon19歲。他和Roesia de Massey至少有2個兒子。他去世於1275年之後在英國爾可努恰福德。

zh-hans.Bucklow, Baguley, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾巴可洛福 希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph de Baguley于大约1230年出生在英国英格兰爾巴古利时，他的父亲Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley35岁，母亲Alice de Vernon19岁。他和Roesia de Massey至少有2个儿子。他去世于1275年之后在英国爾可努恰福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph de Baguley was born about 1230, in Baguley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley, was 35 and his mother, Alice de Vernon, was 19. He had at least 2 sons with Roesia de Massey. He died after 1275, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph de Baguley est né environ 1230, à Baguley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice de Vernon, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Roesia de Massey. Il est décédé après 1275, à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph de Baguley um 1230 in Baguley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley 35 und seine Mutter Alice de Vernon 19. Er hatte mit Roesia de Massey mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb nach 1275 in Knutsford, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Baguleyが約1230年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアバグリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguleyは35歳，母Alice de Vernonは19歳であった。彼はRoesia de Masseyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1275年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Baguley(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 바구리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Vernon(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Roesia de Massey(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1275년 이후 영국 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph de Baguley родился около 1230 г. в местности багули, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard de Baguley - Lord of Baguley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Vernon, 19. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Roesia de Massey. Он умер после 1275 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия.
